CustomField.description: When populated, work logs that would push a work item's total logged hours past its client-approved cap (ClientPreApprovedHoursNumber__c) are hard-blocked at save. When null (default), over-cap logging is allowed but flagged: the item's newest Accepted work request moves to Budget Hold and the approver/developer are notified. Provides an audit trail of when hard enforcement was enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set this to hard-block logging beyond the client-approved hours cap. Leave blank for flag mode (default): over-cap logs save, but the item's Accepted request moves to Budget Hold and the approver is notified.
CustomField.label: Enforce Approval Cap Since
